faqs.question: What are the shipping charges?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping is free for all orders above INR 4,999. For orders below INR 4,999, a flat shipping fee of INR 99 is charged.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Currently, NovaMart only ships to addresses within India. We do not support international shipping at this time.

faqs.question: How long will it take for my order to be delivered?
faqs.answer: Standard delivery takes 3 to 5 business days. Express delivery (available in select metro cities) takes 1 to 2 business days.

faqs.question: How can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Once your order is shipped, we will send you a tracking link via SMS and email. You can also track it directly from the 'My Orders' section on our website.

faqs.question: What is NovaMart's return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 7-day return policy for electronics. Items must be returned in their original packaging, unused, and with the outer seal intact, except in cases of manufacturing defects.

faqs.question: How do I initiate a return?
faqs.answer: Go to 'My Orders' on our website, select the item you wish to return, click 'Return Item', and choose a reason. We will arrange a free reverse pickup within 48 hours.

faqs.question: How long does it take to receive my refund?
faqs.answer: Once the returned product reaches our warehouse and passes quality checks, we process the refund. It takes 5 to 7 business days for the amount to reflect in your original payment method.

faqs.question: Will my shipping fee be refunded if I return an item?
faqs.answer: No. Standard delivery charges (if any) paid at the time of purchase are non-refundable unless the item received was damaged, defective, or incorrect.

faqs.question: What does the product warranty cover?
faqs.answer: All items come with a standard manufacturer's warranty covering structural and functional defects. It does not cover physical damage, water entry, or unauthorized repairs.

faqs.question: How do I claim a warranty for a defective product?
faqs.answer: To claim your warranty, present your tax invoice at the nearest brand-authorized service center. You can also contact our support team to help guide you through the process.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept major Credit cards, Debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), Netbanking, and Cash on Delivery (COD).

faqs.question: Is Cash on Delivery (COD) available for all orders?
faqs.answer: Cash on Delivery is available for orders valued up to INR 20,000 in eligible pin codes. Orders above this threshold must be paid online.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order after it has been placed?
faqs.answer: You can cancel your order directly from 'My Orders' before it is shipped. Once the order status changes to 'Shipped', it cannot be canceled; however, you can refuse delivery.

faqs.question: What happens if NovaMart cancels my order?
faqs.answer: If we cancel your order due to stock unavailability or payment issues, we will notify you immediately and initiate a full, auto-refund to your payment source.

faqs.question: Can I exchange an item for a different model or color?
faqs.answer: Direct exchanges for different models or colors are not supported. You must initiate a return for the existing item and place a fresh order for the preferred one.

faqs.question: What should I do if I receive a damaged or wrong product?
faqs.answer: Please report the issue to our customer support within 24 hours of delivery with unboxing photos/video. We will arrange a free pickup and priority replacement.

faqs.question: How can I reset my account password?
faqs.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen, enter your registered email address or phone number, and follow the link or enter the OTP sent to reset it.

faqs.question: Do I need to create an account to place an order?
faqs.answer: No. You can check out as a guest. However, creating an account helps you track orders quickly and access your order history easily.

faqs.question: When will an 'Out of Stock' product be restocked?
faqs.answer: Most items are restocked within 7 to 10 business days. You can click 'Notify Me' on the product page to receive an alert as soon as it becomes available.

faqs.question: Can I pre-order or reserve a product?
faqs.answer: No, we do not offer pre-orders or product reservation services. Items are sold on a first-come, first-served basis once they are officially in stock.
